locations: scripts/core/Constants.js:8 (HIGH-001: Bundle Fuse.js — deferred, needs architecture decision)
scripts/services/StorageService.js:250 (schema validation — deferred, needs larger refactor)

findings.title: GitHub OAuth Token in Plaintext .env
findings.notes: Token must be revoked by user at github.com/settings/tokens. .env patterns added to .gitignore.

findings.title: CDN Dependency Without SRI
findings.notes: Awaiting user decision: bundle locally vs SRI vs post-load verification. TODO added in code. CDN version (7.0.0) differs from devDep (^7.1.0).

findings.title: Inline Event Handlers (CSP Bypass)
findings.notes: Replaced with addEventListener delegation using capture:true for load/error events. Verified: zero inline handlers in all 8 templates and UIManager.js.

findings.title: No URL Validation on TVA Cache Fetch
findings.notes: Added origin validation (lines 187-205) and credentials:'omit' (line 208). Note: HEAD request at line 347 still lacks credentials:'omit' — tracked as TODO in code.

findings.title: Worker Message Handler Without Input Validation
findings.notes: Switch/default with validation and console.warn for unknown commands.

findings.title: Error Stack Traces Exposed
findings.notes: Worker postMessage uses error.message only (not stack). main.js:726 has TODO to remove stack from error dialog — partial fix.

findings.title: tinymce XSS (transitive dev dep)
findings.notes: Dev dependency only (@league-of-foundry-developers/foundry-vtt-types), not shipped. npm audit still reports 2 moderate. No production impact.

findings.title: No Protocol Validation on Image Paths
findings.notes: Added javascript:/data:/vbscript: protocol rejection in sanitizePath() at lines 79-83.

findings.title: Prototype Key Traversal in extractPathFromObject
findings.notes: Added __proto__, constructor, prototype key filtering at line 306. Additional TODO at line 282 for hasOwnProperty hardening.

findings.title: IndexedDB/localStorage Data Without Schema Validation
findings.notes: Larger refactor needed. TODO added in code. Existing JSON.parse try-catch and __proto__ filtering provide baseline protection.

findings.title: Build Script Variable Injection Risk
findings.notes: Strict regex validation for VERSION (semver) and MODULE_ID (alphanumeric+dash) in both scripts.

findings.title: Silent Error Handling Patterns
findings.notes: All previously empty catch blocks now have console.warn or console.error. Verified across ScanService, UIManager, IndexService, TVACacheService, SearchOrchestrator.

findings.title: Hardcoded Fallback Image Path
findings.notes: Extracted to FALLBACK_IMAGE constant, used via addEventListener in UIManager.js lines 531, 612, 794.

findings.title: Console Logging Sensitive Paths
findings.notes: console.warn in sanitizePath() is intentional for security debugging. Paths are only logged when validation fails.

findings.title: Window Global Exposure
findings.notes: Object.freeze breaks mutable singleton. Standard Foundry practice. Would need proxy/facade pattern for proper isolation. TODO tracked in .planning/todos/.

findings.title: package.json Version Mismatch
findings.notes: Both module.json and package.json now at 2.12.4.

findings.title: Filter Term localStorage Without Length Limit
findings.notes: 200-char max length check in loadFilterTerm() at line 91.
